Class-Rogue 20 — Female Human Rogue: 20
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 15 (+2) Intelligence: 14 (+2) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 13 (+1)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Lawful Neutral Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 1; Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 3; Wisdom: 1 Experience: 496140/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 7 to distribute
Second-Story Work: Has a 30' climb Speed
Stroke Of Luck: Can take an automatic 20 on an ability check once per short rest
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 6; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Rogue (Rogue Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Boon Of Dimensional Travel; Grappler; Magic Initiate (Druid); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Savage Attacker; Skilled Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Rogue Features: Armor Training (Light); Cunning Action; Cunning Strike; Devious Strikes; Elusive; Epic Boon; Evasion; Expertise; Fast Hands; Improved Cunning Strike; Reliable Talent; Rogue Subclass; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Intelligence); Second-Story Work; Skill Proficiency (Choose 4 from Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Persuasion, Sleight Of Hand, Stealth); Slippery Mind; Sneak Attack; Steady Aim; Stroke Of Luck; Supreme Sneak; Thief's Reflexes; Thief; Thieves' Cant; Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools); Uncanny Dodge; Use Magic Device; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Rogue Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +8 Insight: (wis) +13 Performance: (cha) +7
Animal Handling: (wis) +1 Intimidation: (cha) +1 Persuasion: (cha) +1
Arcana: (int) +14 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +8
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +8
Deception: (cha) +13 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +14
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +1 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Arcana; Deception; Insight; Performance; Religion; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth
Expertise: Arcana; Deception; Insight; Stealth
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex); Thieves' Tools: (dex)
Languages: Infernal
Skill Notes:
Expertise: +6 on 4 chosen proficient skills
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Thieves'Cant: Language (Choose 1 from any)
Reliable Talent: Scores at least a 10 on proficient skill and tool checks
Second-Story Work: +1' running jump distance
Thieves'Cant: Understands jargon and signs known only by rogues
Use Magic Device: Has a 1 in 6 chance of using a magic item without expending a charge and can attune 4 magic items, use cantrip and level 1 spell scrolls reliably, and use higher-level spell scrolls with a successful DC 10 + spell level Arcana check
Combat
Hit Points: 104 Initiative: +8 Armor Class: 13
Armor Training: Light Weapon Proficiency: Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Leather Shield: None Weapons: Greatclub (+7 1d8+1 B; Push); Light Crossbow (+8 1d8+2 P R80/320; Slow); Light Hammer (+7 1d4+1 B R20/60; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +40
Devious Strikes: Has increased Cunning Strike effects
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Improved Cunning Strike: Has increased Cunning Strike effects
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Can teleport 30' after attacking or casting
Cunning Action: Can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide
Cunning Strike: Can reduce Sneak Attack damage to inflict 2 choices of: limitation to 1 action or move on the target's next turn (save Constitution negates) (reduces damage by 2d6 HP), unconsciousness (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (reduces damage by 6d6 HP), blindness until the end of its next turn (save Dexterity negates) (reduces damage by 3d6), poisoned (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), prone (save Dexterity negates) (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), or to move 15' after attacking without provoking opportunity attacks (reduces damage by 1d6 HP)
Elusive: Attacks on self never have advantage
Fast Hands: Can use a bonus action to disarm a trap, open a lock, pick a pocket, or take a Utilize action
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Sneak Attack: Inflicts +10d6 HP on attacks with advantage or on a foe threatened by another adjacent creature once per turn
Steady Aim: Can use a bonus action and forego moving to gain advantage on the next attack in the same turn
Supreme Sneak: Can use Cunning Strike to attack while invisible from hiding without becoming visible; reduces the damage by 1d6 HP
Thief's Reflexes: Can take an second turn during the first combat round at initiative - 10
Uncanny Dodge: Can use a reaction to reduce the damage from a seen attacker by half
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen kinds of Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Dexterity; Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +7; Constitution: +2; Dexterity: +8; Intelligence: +8; Strength: +1; Wisdom: +7
Save Notes:
Slippery Mind: Save Proficiency (Charisma; Wisdom)
Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Magic
Attack: C: +7; D: +7; W: +8 Spell DC: C: 15; D: 15; W: 16
Magic Notes:
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
